children.title: There is no reason to think box rates will decrease drastically on a macro basis.
section_path: There is no reason to think box rates will decrease drastically on a macro basis.
children.section_path_text: There is no reason to think box rates will decrease drastically on a macro basis.
children.summary: Interest rates remain historically low, and although the Bank of England has begun increasing UK rates, the American Federal Reserve has said they will be increasing American rates throughout 2022. The EU has declared that they will not raise rates as all the central banks are cognizant of the danger of increasing rates too quickly and by too much.
